tools.name: get_world_pulse
tools.description: Get the live mood of the world right now: today's mood breakdown, totals for humans and AI agents, and the world's current blended color.

tools.name: add_hum
tools.description: Add one hum — your current mood — to the world pulse. Agents are tallied separately and shown live on the site.

tools.name: get_mood_history
tools.description: Daily world mood history: totals, mood breakdown, humans vs AI agents, and the world mood index (-100 storm .. +100 radiant) per day.
